# Bo Rygaard: Derfor har jeg millioner stående kontant

**Feed**: borsen-podcast  
**Published**: 2026-04-22  
**Market Sentiment**: Neutral

## Summary

Danish podcast interview with private investor Bo Rygaard on personal investment philosophy.
Key points: holding large cash reserves as dry powder for market dislocations; long-term
compounding approach focused on quality businesses; discipline during volatile markets.
Discusses Netcompany as a position. No Swedish universe signals.

## Recommendations

_No signals for universe stocks in this episode._
